org_constraint: The email must include the phrase "I am eager to explore the wealth of knowledge your library offers."

Subject: Request for Access to Digital Resources

Dear Library Staff,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally request access to the various digital resources available through your institution. As a local resident seeking to further my learning and research capabilities, I believe these collections offer invaluable tools for personal and academic growth.

I am eager to explore the wealth of knowledge your library offers. Please let me know what steps I need to take to activate my account or obtain the necessary credentials for remote access.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Address]
[Phone Number]<|im_end|>

Subject: Request for Access to Digital Resources

Dear Library Staff,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally request access to the various digital resources available through your institution. As a local resident seeking to further my learning and research capabilities, I believe these collections offer invaluable tools for personal and academic growth.

I am eager to explore the wealth of knowledge your library offers. Please let me know what steps I need to take to activate my account or obtain the necessary credentials for remote access.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Address]
[Phone Number]<|im_end|>
